items.title: Bitcoin relief rally faces headwinds as bear market persists: analysts
items.summary: “Even after the recent price rally, fundamental and technical indicators still point to a bear market environment,” said CryptoQuant.

items.title: Lyn Alden tips Bitcoin outperforming gold over next ‘two to three years’
items.summary: Macroeconomist Lyn Alden says gold has a “somewhat euphoric” sentiment around it, while Bitcoin is being treated “somewhat unfairly negative.”

items.title: Solana ETFs still hold ‘impressive numbers’ even as token dives 57%
items.summary: Bloomberg ETF analyst Eric Balchunas says Solana ETF inflows are posting “pretty impressive numbers,” even as the token has dropped by more than half since they launched.

items.title: Solv Protocol offers 10% bounty after hacker snatches $2.7M
items.summary: Crypto security researchers say the hacker exploited a bug allowing them to mint tokens, before swapping the freely-gained tokens for another tied to Bitcoin.

items.title: US regulators say tokenized securities subject to same capital rules
items.summary: The Federal Reserve and US banking regulators have clarified that tokenized securities are subject to the same capital treatment as traditional assets.

items.title: Dems plan bill to curb prediction markets after ‘very specific’ Iran strike bets
items.summary: Senator Chris Murphy says it’s likely people close to Donald Trump with “inside information” made bets on prediction markets on when the US would strike Iran.

items.title: Construction begins at quantum facility big enough to break Bitcoin
items.summary: PsiQuantum co-founder Terry Rudolph said in July it has no plans to attack Bitcoin, even if its upcoming facility becomes powerful enough to break the blockchain’s cryptography.

items.title: SEC ends case against Justin Sun with $10M settlement
items.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission has ended its long-running fraud and securities violation lawsuit against Justin Sun after one of his companies agreed to pay a $10 million fine.

items.title: Ether’s path to $2.5K may be trickier than expected: Here’s why
items.summary: Crypto markets spent the week chasing green, but Ether’s rally toward $2,500 might hit significant setbacks. Cointelegraph explains why.

items.title: IRS proposes mandating electronic delivery of tax forms for crypto
items.summary: If adopted, the proposal will take effect on Jan. 1 of the calendar year following the publication of the final IRS rules.

items.title: Bitcoin miners offload 15K BTC since October, with more sales expected
items.summary: Public miners are trimming Bitcoin reserves as tightening margins, debt pressure and a post-crash reset force the industry to rethink its once-popular hold strategy.

items.title: CleanSpark sells 553 BTC for $36.6M in February as miners offload Bitcoin
items.summary: The Nasdaq-listed miner sold nearly all of its February production while expanding power capacity in Texas and maintaining a treasury of more than 13,000 BTC.

items.title: Trump son echoes president's anti-bank message amid stablecoin yield fight
items.summary: The post from Eric Trump, tagging his crypto company, came hours after his father claimed banks were holding a market structure bill “hostage.”

items.title: Dollar-cost averaging Bitcoin is safest strategy for long-term gains: Data
items.summary: Backtested data and forward-looking models found that dollar-cost averaging Bitcoin buys is the best way to invest in BTC. Will the strategy work in the next bull market?

items.title: Ether traders see ‘larger bounce’ after ETH price taps $2.2K
items.summary: Ether traders said ETH price could see further upside as long as bulls defended the $2,100 support, fueled by renewed demand.

items.title: 38% of altcoins near all-time lows, worse than FTX crash: Analyst
items.summary: The crypto altcoin market is in turmoil as investor sentiment plummets and digital asset prices fail to recover from the October 2025 crash.

items.title: Core Scientific secures up to $1B credit from Morgan Stanley for data centers
items.summary: The Bitcoin miner and data center operator said the financing will support infrastructure tied to high-density computing workloads, including artificial intelligence and HPC.

items.title: SoFi taps BitGo to provide infrastructure for bank-issued stablecoin
items.summary: BitGo will support the rollout of US dollar-pegged stablecoin SoFiUSD, as US fintechs and banks expand digital dollar infrastructure following new federal legislation.

items.title: FBI arrests custody company CEO‘s son over alleged $46M crypto theft
items.summary: FBI director Kash Patel posted a photo a handcuffed John Daghita, as well as one of seized items including cash, thumb drives, a phone and devices resembling hardware wallets.

items.title: SEC proposes 'token taxonomy' for interpreting crypto under securities laws
items.summary: The proposed interpretative application of federal securities laws on digital assets by the SEC reportedly carries more weight than staff-level statements.

items.title: Cardano can now be used to pay at 137 Spar stores across Switzerland
items.summary: Supermarket chain Spar now accepts ADA payments at 137 stores in Switzerland as crypto payment options expand in the country.

items.title: Vancouver Moves to Close Bitcoin Reserve Proposal After Legal Review
items.summary: Over a year after Vancouver explored becoming a “Bitcoin-friendly city,” staff say municipal law bars holding Bitcoin in city reserves.

items.title: Crypto Exchange OKX Debuts Social Platform Linking Posts to Trades
items.summary: Orbit allows traders to disclose portfolio data and earn rewards tied to follower engagement in what OKX is touting as a transparency play.

items.title: Nvidia Is Probably Done Investing in OpenAI and Anthropic, Says CEO—Why?
items.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang blamed potential IPOs for ending the chip giant's investment run—right as both AI labs are immersed in controversy.

items.title: SEC Moves to Settle Justin Sun Case With $10M Penalty for BitTorrent Owner
items.summary: The judgment would resolve one of the agency’s highest-profile crypto enforcement actions and dismiss the remaining claims against Sun.

items.title: Roblox Is Now Using AI to Rewrite Chat Swears in Real Time
items.summary: Roblox's new AI feature replaces blocked messages with rewritten text to keep conversations readable while enforcing platform rules.

items.title: Dogecoin Down Bad as Bitcoin Gives Up Latest Gains
items.summary: After a strong bounce on Wednesday, Dogecoin is leading the top 100 tokens in losses on Thursday as Bitcoin falls.

items.title: Iran Regime's Crypto Activity Topped $3 Billion as Illicit Transactions Surged in 2025: Report
items.summary: Iran, Russia, North Korea, and other sanctioned countries boosted their use of cryptocurrency last year, according to Chainalysis.

items.title: Penguin Apparel Brand Targets Crypto IP Pudgy Penguins in Trademark Infringement Lawsuit
items.summary: The firm behind the Original Penguin brand is suing Pudgy Penguins in a lawsuit that alleges the crypto brand infringes on its trademarks.

items.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.4 Days Just After Last Version as 'QuitGPT' Exodus Gains Steam
items.summary: OpenAI debuted its most capable model yet under pressure from a mass user exodus tied to the company's controversial Pentagon contract.

items.title: ZeroHash Applies for National Trust Bank Charter as OCC Crypto Pipeline Grows
items.summary: ZeroHash wants OCC trust bank status for crypto custody—and Revolut is gunning for a full U.S. banking license.

items.title: Cardano's ADA Token Now Accepted at Spar Supermarkets in Switzerland
items.summary: Brick-and-mortar retail payments in Swiss Spar stores are enabled through the Cardano blockchain’s integration with DFX.swiss.

items.title: Bitcoin Price Predictions Flip Bullish, But Ethereum Is Still Stuck
items.summary: Prediction market traders are becoming more bullish on Bitcoin's near-term price, but they're not as confident on Ethereum.

items.title: Federal Contractor’s Son Arrested, Charged With Stealing $46 Million From US Crypto Stockpile
items.summary: John Daghita was publicly accused of the crime by blockchain sleuth ZachXBT in January.

items.title: Core Scientific Secures Up to $1 Billion From Morgan Stanley for Pivot From Bitcoin Mining to AI
items.summary: The firm continues to pivot away from Bitcoin mining.

items.title: Morning Minute: Kraken Cracks the Fed
items.summary: Kraken made crypto history yesterday, receiving federal banking access that's been sought after by the industry for years.

items.title: OKB Token Surges 38% on NYSE’s OKX Investment at $25B Valuation
items.summary: The New York Stock Exchange’s parent company has invested in crypto exchange OKX as part of a push into tokenized stocks.
